home.roleDesc: CS Student · Passionate about tech & creativity

blog.postNotFoundDesc: The link may have changed. Go back to see the latest articles.
blog.sidebarUpdateDesc: Weekly learning summaries. Feel free to chat!

about.aboutDesc1: Hi! I'm a computer science student passionate about the intersection of technology and creativity. My main interests include software development, frontend engineering, and various areas of computer science.
about.aboutDesc2: I love open-source culture and enjoy experimenting with new technologies. In my free time, I'm into cycling, Rubik's cube, hiking, and martial arts — hobbies that keep me active and cultivate focus and patience.
about.hobbyCyclingDesc: Exploring cities and nature by bike
about.hobbyHikingDesc: Into the wild, feeling nature's calm
about.hobbyPhotographyDesc: Capturing beautiful moments through the lens
about.contactNote: Feel free to reach out if you have any questions, collaboration ideas, or just want to chat!

hobbyDetailCycling.title: Cycling
hobbyDetailCycling.subtitle: Exploring Cities and Nature
hobbyDetailCycling.description: Cycling is one of my favorite outdoor activities. Every time I hop on my bike and ride through city streets or country roads, that sense of freedom is intoxicating. Whether it's a sunrise ride in the morning or an evening cruise along the riverbank, cycling always lets me clear my mind and enjoy the peace and beauty of the moment.

hobbyDetailCube.title: Rubik's Cube
hobbyDetailCube.subtitle: The Art of Speedcubing
hobbyDetailCube.description: The Rubik's Cube is more than just a puzzle toy — it's an art form. From fumbling with it initially to smoothly solving it now, every breakthrough brings great satisfaction. Speedcubing requires focus, memory, and finger coordination, and this challenge keeps me engaged.

hobbyDetailHiking.title: Hiking
hobbyDetailHiking.subtitle: Into the Wild, Feeling Nature
hobbyDetailHiking.description: Away from the city's noise, deep into the mountains, feeling nature's tranquility and grandeur. Hiking is not just physical exercise, but also spiritual renewal. Every climb is a challenge to myself, and reaching every summit brings different scenery and insights.

hobbyDetailMartial.title: Martial Arts
hobbyDetailMartial.subtitle: Self-Cultivation and Discipline
hobbyDetailMartial.description: Martial arts are treasures of traditional Chinese culture. Through daily training, one can not only strengthen the body but also refine the mind. Every movement requires focus and persistence. This practice has taught me patience and self-discipline, and given me deeper understanding and respect for traditional culture.

hobbyDetailPhotography.title: Photography
hobbyDetailPhotography.subtitle: Capturing Beautiful Moments
hobbyDetailPhotography.description: Photography is the art of telling stories through light and shadow. Whether it's the city skyline at dawn or an unexpected moment in daily life, I hope to capture these beautiful moments through my lens. Photography has taught me to observe and appreciate the scenery before me.

animation.heroSubtitle: Three.js & Canvas creative visualizations · Click to fullscreen
animation.heroDesc: Each animation is a standalone file, Three.js / Canvas rendered
animation.animNebulaDesc: 3D particle system simulating cosmic nebula flow and color shifts
animation.animWaveDesc: Superimposed sine waves and Bézier curves, showcasing mathematical beauty
animation.animMatrixDesc: Classic matrix digital rain effect, cyberpunk aesthetics
animation.animBallsDesc: Multi-ball elastic collision and rebound physics simulation
animation.animLifeDesc: Conway's Game of Life — cellular automaton in a discrete universe
animation.animTorusDesc: Parametric surfaces and lighting, displaying topological beauty
animation.animGalaxyDesc: Spiral galaxy structure with color gradients along arms
animation.animFireworkDesc: Particle firework explosions with random colors and physics decay
animation.animPlasmaDesc: Organic plasma fluid with continuously changing colors
animation.animRubikDesc: Floating Rubik's cube matrix with random quantum motion
animation.animConstellationDesc: Star connections and twinkling, randomly drifting constellations
animation.animTunnelDesc: Infinitely extending wave tunnel, visual illusion journey
